# Worthless

> Split-key proxy that makes API keys worthless to steal. Zero code changes. Self-hosted. Open source.

## What is Worthless?

Worthless splits your API keys into two cryptographic shares using XOR secret sharing. Neither share reveals the original key alone. Every request goes through the Worthless proxy, which enforces a hard spend cap before the key ever reconstructs. Budget blown = key never forms = request never reaches the provider.

## Pages

- [Home](https://worthless.cloud/): Product overview and value proposition
- [Features](https://worthless.cloud/features.html): Feature list, comparison, and capabilities
- [How It Works](https://worthless.cloud/how-it-works.html): Architecture, security model, and step-by-step walkthrough
- [Blog](https://worthless.cloud/blog/): Articles on API key security, attack scenarios, and best practices

## Install

```
pip install worthless
```

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/shacharm2/worthless)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/worthless/)
